nodes.body: Should we also change line 131? (the one we reverted a few days ago https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/pull/40211/files)
Great catch. Concerning that the cucu test succeeded without this.

that's concerning. One thing we can do to be 100% sure that these services run where they should is to log something when they are initialized (they are likely already doing that, but we can add it if not) and then create a FC instance with new relic enabled. Then we just look for the initialization logs in the cluster and we should only see it in the right pods.
